column1: Daily returns are heavily concentrated around zero, suggesting that most trading days see only small price changes.
Mean daily return is positive, suggesting a slight upward bias over time.
Volatility is moderate, indicating controlled price movement rather than chaotic swings.
Extreme return values were detected and cleaned (676 observations clipped outside -20% to 20%), reducing distortion from anomalies or structural adjustment effects.
The NGX market shows clustering around small returns with occasional sharp moves, suggesting a slower-moving market with intermittent bursts of opportunity.
